case_title: ALI A AALAEI VS. KAREN CHI, et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY AALAEI, ALI A AS TO DEFENDANT CHI, KAREN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-30-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID MCDONALD FILED BY AALAEI, ALI A CHI, KAREN
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED APR-08-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHI, KAREN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AALAEI, ALI A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHI, KAREN BARLOVENTO GROUP, LLC $2,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $144.00 INTEREST, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,019.00, COURT FINDS AS FOLLOWS: (1) DEFENDANTS VIOLATED CIVIL CODE SEC 1950.5 BY NOT PROVIDING WRITTEN ESTIMATE OF DAMAGES WITHIN 21 DAYS OF MOVE OUT; (2) PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO INTEREST; (3) DEFENDANTS CONDUCT WAS NOT IN BAD FAITH. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED APR-08-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BARLOVENTO GROUP, LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES, EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHI, KAREN BARLOVENTO GROUP, LLC
